title: Fail-tease endcard — TOO CLOSE / TRY AGAIN
hypothesis: Inverting the victory CTA into a fail-tease ("barely held the wall, do better?") frames install as a redemption attempt — lifts CTA pull on curious users
diff_from_baseline: playable/endcard.js: 'VICTORY!' → 'TOO CLOSE!' (red), supporting copy reframed as challenge, CTA 'PLAY NOW' → 'TRY AGAIN'
review_notes: Axis respected (endcard copy/colors only). CTA tap handler unchanged. Thumb captured at forced endcard phase.
